custom_css: @media (min-width: 768px) {.sub-link {color: white; font-weight: bold; background-color: black; width: 50%; margin-left: 25%; } .content-404 {margin-top: -100px; }}
@media (max-width: 768px) {.sub-link {color: white; font-weight: bold; background-color: black; } .content-404 {margin-top: -100px; margin-bottom: -120px; }}
